title: If you could room with a character
display_title: If you could room with a character
wikitext:
[]: If you could room with a character             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:25 pm If you had to share an apartment with one character from the series, who would you want as a roomate and why? I would pick Ritsuko. She would probably pull her own weight instead of dumping it all the housework on me like Misato would. If I needed help with my homework or if my computer was on the fritz she could be very helpful. Her cats wouldn't be a problem because I don't hate cats. Not to mention for a 30 year old coffee-drinking, potential chain smoker, she's pretty hot.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:27 pm Rei because... nothing would happen... srsly.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:29 pm Hikari. Some one completely removed from and unrelated to all the insane NERV crap and or mentally unstable pilots.

[]: Re: If you could room with a character             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:34 pm I would pick Ritsuko, on the off chance that she's really into older men, and not just Gendo. Also, the only one who I could bear to share space with and safely SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:52 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei because... I'd be able to take full advantage of her and nothing would happen as a result of it .

[]:             Quote Post by username55 » Mon Oct 05, 2009 5:58 pm That was funny!

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Mon Oct 05, 2009 6:06 pm Misato because getting drunk with her would be awesome or Shinji so I can rape.....I mean, shower him with love and kindness.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Oct 05, 2009 6:49 pm I'd have to pick Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 05, 2009 6:53 pm Probably Rei, since she'd put up with the fact that I like a less than orderly room.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Oct 05, 2009 7:10 pm I would say Rei, living with Asuka or Misato would scare me and Ritsuko would be like living with a mother that is an emotional wreck

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Mon Oct 05, 2009 7:39 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei because... nothing would happen... srsly.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Mon Oct 05, 2009 9:15 pm Sachi wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei because... I'd be able to take full advantage of her and nothing would happen as a result of it .

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 05, 2009 9:27 pm Synapsid wrote: Not quite, [Rei] does have a temper, Remember what happened to Gendo? If you keep prodding her with an offending attachment she'll bite it off Denta at all?

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:22 pm Shinji. I'd get to split the rent/bills/chores with someone who doesn't try to take more space than they're entitled to. I probably could manage something similar with Rei. The thing is, she creeps the hell out of me, and I'm not sure I'd want her walking silently around the apartment; especially not at night when my imagination runs wild.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:33 pm Shinji. Actually, I'd probably go all Kaworu on him... Meaning actually shower him with love and kindness. Whether this would include the possibly-romantic nature of the relationship would have to be seen. I'm normally straight, but this is Shinji...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:36 pm Kensuke. I could use a partner for playing Left 4 Dead...besides watching him geek out over the Evas would be quite amusing.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:51 pm I would have to say Rei. Most easy-to-get-along-with room-mate EVER . She'd be up for hanging out or doing whatever without any protest or whining! I'd have a lot of fun exposing her to my movie and music collection and she probably wouldnt even complain about my nonsensical antics at all hours of the night either. I would imagine she would offer some deep philosophical conversation at random intervals and not eat my beef jerky when I wasnt looking also. <---- FTW

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:58 pm @ Mr tines Ahem Probably Misato because mess aside, I have the most in common with her. Also smoking hot of course.

[]: Re: If you could room with a character             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Oct 06, 2009 12:29 am Mr. Tines wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: If you could room with a character             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Oct 06, 2009 12:38 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: SPOILER: Show
